rationale: All three lenses ran; full triage completed. The diff adds a Prerequisites section to CLAUDE.md documenting the poetry global-install requirement and the diagnostic command for verifying it. The change is documentation-only — no Makefile or source code changes. Blind and edge-case lenses found no issues: the content is accurate, the diagnostic command (`env -i PATH="$PATH" poetry --version`) is correct, and the remediation guidance (`/etc/environment` or `.profile`) matches how non-login shells resolve PATH. Acceptance lens confirmed the single acceptance criterion — documenting the root cause so contributors know how to fix their setup — is satisfied. Standards pass: commit message matches EPMCDME-####: format, branch matches ticket-id prefix convention. Deferred: 0. Dismissed: 0.

business_review.criterion: Root cause documented so contributors know how to resolve the poetry PATH issue
business_review.notes: CLAUDE.md Prerequisites section explains the non-login subshell root cause, provides the exact diagnostic command, and gives two concrete remediation options (/etc/environment and .profile).

business_review.criterion: No regression to shared Makefile or hook configuration
business_review.notes: Diff is CLAUDE.md only — Makefile and settings.json are identical to origin/main. Confirmed by git diff origin/main -- Makefile returning empty.

standards_review.notes: Squashed commit matches required format per git-workflow.md
Branch EPMCDME-11252_fix-stop-hook-make-ruff matches ticket-id prefix convention per git-workflow.md
Diff is CLAUDE.md (Markdown) only; no Python source files changed.
No new source files added. Apache 2.0 header requirement applies to source files, not Markdown documentation.
No security concerns. Documentation change only; no code paths introduced.
